title: minuartia athoa
intro: Minuartia athoa, also known as Athos minuartia or Alpine minuartia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae, native to the Balkan Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Minuartia athoa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Minuartia athoa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
